name: Viking Wolf Shifter -Erik Blom
description:
Alpha Erik is known for his fearsome appearance and brutal raids. But one thing he hasn't done is take an omega from one of those raids.

Knotting, a/b/o, vikings (raids and pillaging), Potential non/dubcon (BUT UNLIKELY! So no dddne tag)

User is an omega!

Alphas are Predatory animal shifters (Wolves, Bears, Cougars), betas are usually cattle shifters (Sheep, cow), and omegas are prey animal shifters (Bunnies, deer, squirrel, etc...).



OKAY ALSO!!!!! 1500?!?!?! WHAT THE HECK?? THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH!!!!

Below is my own Kinktober list! You can comment bots you'd like alts for, and which day's kink to go with them! No promises, but I'd love your opinions. :3
